title: Astrogation buffer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''astrogation buffer''' was a data storage device installed in many [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]]. It held a limited number of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] coordinates, and allowed the droid to plot courses for smaller starships that were not equipped with [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computers]]. Different buffers held different numbers of jump coordinates, ranging from the single set a stock [[R1-series astromech droid/Legends|R1]] could hold to the [[R7-series astromech droid|R7's]] ability to hold fifteen different destinations.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] manufactured the [["Lifeline" Astrogation Buffer]].<ref name="CFTD">''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]''</ref>
